title: Lost Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP) Registration Documents
text:
OFFICE OF THE MANAGING DIRECTOR
International Monetary Affairs and Surveillance Sub-Sector
CIRCULAR LETTER NO. CL-2026-___
To : ALL AUTHORIZED AGENT BANKS (AABs) and
SUBSIDIARY/AFFILIATE FOREIGN EXCHANGE
CORPORATIONS OF AABs (AAB-forex corps)
Subject : Lost Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP) Registration
Documents
Please be advised that the following BSP registration documents
covering the foreign direct investments of VAN MELLE INTERNATIONAL
TRUST B.V., Netherlands in PERFETTI VAN MELLE PHILS, INC.1, have been
reported lost:
BSP Registration Date of No. of Shares
Document No. Registration Registered
CB-FEOID (FI) 88-00363 12-Oct-1988 210,000
CB-FEOID (FI) 89-00005 09-Jan-1989 984,000
CB-FEOID (FI) 89-00131 06-Jun-1989 1,222,000
TOTAL 2,416,000
Said registration documents havs been applied for replacement and
should not be honored if found and presented for purchase of foreign
exchange for capital repatriation or remittance of earnings, pursuant to
Section 38 of the Manual of Regulations on Foreign Exchange Transactions,
as amended.
For information and compliance.
THOMAS BENJAMIN B. MARCELO
Managing Director
_2_6_ March 2026
1 Formerly VAN MELLE PHILIPPINES, INC.; Change of name approved by the Securities and
Exchange Commission under the Certificate of Filing of Amended Articles of Incorporation
dated 01 October 2001.
